name: warmpath-ingest
description: WarmPath ingestion: raw text (Slack message / doc snippet) -> {person, skill, evidence, proficiency} triples as strict JSON. The backend does the deterministic Neo4j MERGE; this only extracts.
_note: Same stateless webhook -> question -> llm -> response_answers shape as the query pipelines. A prompt node behind a webhook accumulates state; question does not.
